programmes.show_description: Tense thriller with Martin Kemp. A sniper is blackmailed into shooting six people in six hours - and if he refuses, the terrorist behind the scheme promises to raise the death toll even higher. (2015)

Tense thriller with Gene Hackman. A Los Angeles assistant district attorney and the key witness in a gangland murder case are stalked by hitmen on board a train speeding through the Rockies. (1990)
Sci-fi action. It's a deadly race against time to prevent a global disaster after a meteor crashes into the moon and puts it on a collision course with Earth. (2020)
A prospector is cursed by a conjurer as he plans a mining venture in Africa. S3, Ep12

Fact meets fiction in this compelling 1960s crime drama. Sherlock Holmes and Dr Watson join the hunt for the notorious serial killer known as Jack The Ripper. (1965)

Disaster drama with Charlton Heston. When a passenger plane is plunged into chaos after a mid-air collision with a private jet, an air traffic controller helps a stewardess make a safe landing. (1975)
Psychological thriller with James Spader. When a copycat killer begins a murder spree on the 100th anniversary of the Jack the Ripper killings, suspicion falls on a squeaky-clean doctor. (1988)
Drama based on Christopher Marlowe's play, with Richard Burton. An ageing scholar strikes an unholy bargain with the Devil: youth, wisdom and the woman of his dreams, in exchange for his soul. (1967)
